outcome.text:
21.9 *Glaucium*

PForml 1,0–1,4. Exine 2–2,5 µm. Colpus-membranen met 1,0–1,5(2,0) µm hoekige elementen.

*Glaucium corniculatum* (L.) RUDOLPH (3)
27,5–40,0 µm, MiW 34,0 µm; 50 PK, 0a
